source: chat: accepted roadmap transition decisions; source feedback build .codewiki/builds/feedback/2026-05-09-roadmap-transition-decisions.json
summary: Applied roadmap transition: accepted sparse-link/graph ownership policy, active-roadmap retention policy, rewrote active tasks to flat KB specs, cancelled deferred future-adapter/sprint/UI/ThinkCode work, sanitized stale closed-task spec refs, and set roadmap retention to archive future closed tasks immediately.
knowledge_changes: system/knowledge.md now says curated Markdown links are human navigation inputs, while graph owns exhaustive machine relationships.
system/graph.md now documents frontmatter, curated links, builds, roadmap, validation, code/test facts, and fingerprints as graph inputs.
system/roadmap.md now defines roadmap as active work truth, with closed/cancelled task detail leaving hot state after retention/checkpoint.
system/file-structure.md maps roadmap component to roadmap.json, active task state, checkpoints, and archives.
lexicon.md updated for roadmap tasks, documentation builds, graph links, and builder semantics.
Flat system component docs gained Related docs sections to satisfy graph doc hygiene.
roadmap_changes: Set .codewiki/config.json roadmap_retention.closed_task_limit to 0 for future closed-task archival.
Created roadmap release checkpoint roadmap-transition-before-active-hotset-archive before attempting active-hotset migration.
Rewrote active TASK-30 as DDD application layer and port boundaries.
Rewrote active TASK-034 as skill package alignment with compiler/API contracts.
Rewrote active TASK-035 as graph-backed traceability and active-roadmap policy enforcement.
Rewrote active TASK-038 as gated-agency heartbeat controller.
Rewrote active TASK-043 as implementation-build handoff and publication prep.
Rewrote active TASK-046 as tester/builder roles from documentation builds.
Cancelled TASK-32 minimal CLI proof as deferred future adapter work.
Cancelled TASK-036 sprint planning model as overcomplicated for current active-roadmap/builds/graph model.
Cancelled TASK-037 standalone UI as deferred visual implementation.
Cancelled TASK-039 ThinkCode runtime adapter as optional future work.
Sanitized stale spec_paths on closed/cancelled legacy tasks so generated graph has zero missing roadmap spec-path errors.
assumptions: Closed task archival for existing done tasks is not complete because the current close tool's verifier blocks re-closing already-done tasks; TASK-035 tracks proper retention cleanup.
Existing closed task details remain in roadmap.json as compact retained history until retention tooling can archive them safely.
The one remaining graph warning is system/overview.md large-doc size; it is acceptable for the overview until a follow-up split/cut is planned.
open_questions: Exact closed-task retention window and checkpoint/archive UX still need implementation work under TASK-035.
